faq.question: How can I check flood risk risk for a specific property in Lake Macquarie?

faq.question: Does flood risk risk affect property insurance in Lake Macquarie?

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 4.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
